causalAutopsy.notes: Net-new capability requested by the operator (2026-06-07, topic 19437): a generalized, reusable iterative-converging-audit skill + a constitutionally-grounded standard. Not a fix of a prior PR — it generalizes the audit-to-convergence loop already executed for the LLM-fallback safety work (#991/#992/#996) into a standing skill + two registry standards.
